event: Deep debug Captain-only POS session-expired outage
note: Read-only HE Odoo audit confirmed issue is Captain-only, not all POS and not server-wide. Cash Counter and Ground Floor continued creating pos.order/pos.payment and KDS prep records after Captain stopped. Captain config 6/session 269 is still opened and correctly configured with default pricelist 40 and available [40,45]; V2 orders were successfully recorded after the pricelist switch (e.g. Captain paid orders 7994/8001/8003 on pricelist 45), proving deployment did not break config 6. After Captain latest paid order 7994 at 2026-05-24 17:50:33 UTC (23:20 IST), there are no Captain pos.order, pos.payment, or prep/KDS records for the repeated failed attempts. Repeated same error means staff kept re-entering inside the same stale/expired Captain browser auth session; frontend can render POS from local browser state, but backend rejects validation with Session expired.
next_action: Recover Captain by preserving tablet local POS data first: do not clear site data initially; login fresh to test.hamzahotel.com in same Chrome/profile, return/refresh Captain POS and sync/recover pending orders. If still blocked, open Captain POS config 6 on a different fresh browser/device for live service and quarantine the stale tablet until unsynced orders are reconciled/cancelled to avoid duplicate later sync.

event: Debug Zomato direct cURL replay
note: Root cause was local parser error: the direct puller parsed -H headers but ignored cURL -b/--cookie, so Zomato CSRF headers were replayed without browser cookies and returned 401. Dry-run now returns Zomato HTTP 200 with 10 snippets and hasMore=true; no ingest/deploy/mutation performed.

event: Audit Late Night campaign 96-click leak before budget move
note: Read-only deep audit of Late Night campaign 23854158442 before any budget mutation. Live all-period stats: 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.82 spend, avg CPC ₹33.01, 0 Google conversions. Click concentration: Open Now Near Me ad group took 81/96 clicks and ₹2,764.50 spend; Biryani/Kabab took 10 clicks/₹292.26; Late Night Bangalore took 4 clicks/₹87.53; Non Veg Halal took 1 click/₹24.54. Top keyword was exact 'restaurants near me open now' with 35 clicks/₹1,178.96 and Quality Score 1/below-average landing + predicted CTR. Top reported search term was 'restaurants nearby' with 21 clicks/₹694.71; reported search terms explain only 39/96 clicks, so Google withholds many query details. Landing proof: /go/google-night is a 200 HTML landing page with buttons, not a direct Maps redirect. /api/google-ads-landing-event shows 66 pageviews, 15 maps clicks, 3 calls, 1 WhatsApp, 1 menu over 30d; therefore only about 15.6% of Google clicks became Maps taps and only 1% became WhatsApp. Root issue: broad generic near-me restaurant demand + non-direct landing funnel, not enough high-intent Maps/dish conversion.
next_action: Do not move all budget blindly. Recommended correction before/with budget move: tighten Late Night toward dish/open-now intent, reduce generic near-me spend or force direct directions landing, and add measurement for gclid/source on directions; then reallocate Dinner/Brand budget only after rollback-safe budget readback.
mutation_status: read-only audit only; no budget or keyword mutation
